pages.text: Sub-atomic particles exhibiting massive gravity distortion fields. $(item)Gravitons$() are essential for crafting $(l:patchouli:materials/alloys_disks)Inertial Stability Alloy$() in the $(l:patchouli:machines/primal_catalyst)Primal Catalyst$().

pages.title: Usage
pages.text: Gravitons are used primarily in the $(l:patchouli:machines/primal_catalyst)Primal Catalyst$() to create $(l:patchouli:materials/alloys_disks)Inertial Stability Alloy$(), which enables infinite pyramid operation!
